'''ât-f-s-f''' ('''katafsefoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rubble|rubble]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-f-s-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rubble|rubble]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-f-s-f
|-
! Lemma
| katafsefoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitafsefoko|thitafsefoko]] || [[word:jitafsefoko|jitafsefoko]] || [[word:shitafsefoko|shitafsefoko]] || [[word:kitafsefoko|kitafsefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutafsefoko|thuthutafsefoko]] || [[word:jujutafsefoko|jujutafsefoko]] || [[word:shushutafsefoko|shushutafsefoko]] || [[word:kukutafsefoko|kukutafsefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutafsefoko|thutafsefoko]] || [[word:jutafsefoko|jutafsefoko]] || [[word:shutafsefoko|shutafsefoko]] || [[word:kutafsefoko|kutafsefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutafsefoko|thutafsefoko]] || [[word:jutafsefoko|jutafsefoko]] || [[word:shutafsefoko|shutafsefoko]] || [[word:kutafsefoko|kutafsefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetafsefoko|thetafsefoko]] || [[word:jetafsefoko|jetafsefoko]] || [[word:shetafsefoko|shetafsefoko]] || [[word:ketafsefoko|ketafsefoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotafsefoko|thotafsefoko]] || [[word:jotafsefoko|jotafsefoko]] || [[word:shotafsefoko|shotafsefoko]] || [[word:kotafsefoko|kotafsefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotafsefoko|thotafsefoko]] || [[word:jotafsefoko|jotafsefoko]] || [[word:shotafsefoko|shotafsefoko]] || [[word:kotafsefoko|kotafsefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠtafsefoko|thĂŠtafsefoko]] || [[word:jĂŠtafsefoko|jĂŠtafsefoko]] || [[word:shĂŠtafsefoko|shĂŠtafsefoko]] || [[word:kĂŠtafsefoko|kĂŠtafsefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatafsefoko|thathatafsefoko]] || [[word:jajatafsefoko|jajatafsefoko]] || [[word:shashatafsefoko|shashatafsefoko]] || [[word:kakatafsefoko|kakatafsefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatafsefoko|thatafsefoko]] || [[word:jatafsefoko|jatafsefoko]] || [[word:shatafsefoko|shatafsefoko]] || [[word:katafsefoko|katafsefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatafsefoko|thatafsefoko]] || [[word:jatafsefoko|jatafsefoko]] || [[word:shatafsefoko|shatafsefoko]] || [[word:katafsefoko|katafsefoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shatafsefithi|shatafsefithi]] || [[word:shatafsefiji|shatafsefiji]] || [[word:shatafsefishi|shatafsefishi]] || [[word:shatafsefiki|shatafsefiki]]
